series_metadata.series_description: Contains date and amount deposited with Treasurer of State, source of money, rendering department name and Auditor of State's numbers. Serves as a transmittal slip to Treeasurer of State accompanying deposits of money and negotiable instruments received

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 fiscal years after t the close of the fiscal year in which created, or until audit report is released, whichever is later, and then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
